calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions For Distribution Of Trust Upon Termination
Off Calendar May-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Leong for Jeffery Neishi.

The Court asked if there were any objections or additional argument. Ms. Leong stated that there was a question as to whether the gift was adeemed or not and that they provided 2 orders. The Court stated that it understood that it was not adeemed. The Court granted the petition for instructions for distribution of trust upon termination (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Nancy Wong. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
